summary: Frontend-only retest of QR Preview Dialog (Vendors.js L723) sticky-footer-overlap fix. The override className 'static mx-0 px-0 pt-2 border-t-0 bg-transparent' on DialogFooter neutralizes the shared component default 'sticky bottom-0'. Verified on 3 viewports (iPhone SE 375x667, iPhone 15 Pro 393x852, Desktop 1440x900) via deterministic getBoundingClientRect: footer is strictly BELOW the QR image and below the landing-url info box. Functional flows verified: 'Scarica PNG' triggers PNG download, 'Chiudi' closes the modal. Regression on the 2 other DialogFooters in Vendors.js (vendor create/edit dialog at L567, credentials dialog at L632) confirmed: both still computed `position: sticky / bottom: 0px` — the fix is correctly scoped to only the qr-preview-dialog.
critical_code_review_comments: Vendors.js L723 — override `static mx-0 px-0 pt-2 border-t-0 bg-transparent` correctly wins over dialog.jsx default 'sticky bottom-0 -mx-4 ... border-t ...' via tailwind-merge in cn(). Computed style confirmed: position=static on all 3 viewports. Scope is local — other dialogs in same file untouched. Good targeted fix consistent with iter 8 PushBroadcastDialog pattern.

Tech debt (already noted iter 8): DialogFooter default 'sticky bottom-0' is fragile because DialogContent is not a real scroll container unless content overflows. Two dialogs already need the same override (PushBroadcastDialog, QrPreviewDialog). Consider refactoring dialog.jsx so the default is non-sticky and opt-in for long forms — would simplify any future short-content dialog.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (3/3 viewports PASS overlap check; download PASS; close PASS; regression on 2 sibling dialogs PASS)

test_credentials: admin@example.com / admin123 (QA Test Org). Login OK on /login.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Bug fixed and verified. Measurements (getBoundingClientRect, px):
- iPhone SE 375x667: image.bottom=392, landing.bottom=510, footer.top=582, download.top=590 — footer.top >= image.bottom ✓, footer.top >= landing.bottom ✓.
- iPhone 15 Pro 393x852: image.bottom=479.5, landing.bottom=581.5, footer.top=653.5, download.top=661.5 ✓✓.
- Desktop 1440x900: image.bottom=527.5, landing.bottom=629.5, footer.top=701.5, download.top=714.5 ✓✓.
Footer computed position on all 3 = 'static' (was sticky before override). Footer.className contains both default sticky classes AND the override; tailwind-merge resolves to static at runtime.
Functional: 'Scarica PNG' downloads qr_<id>.png correctly. 'Chiudi' closes modal correctly.
Regression: vendor-dialog (L567) footer = sticky/bottom:0px (unchanged). credentials-dialog (L632) footer = sticky/bottom:0px (unchanged). Fix scoped to qr-preview-dialog only.
Visual screenshot Desktop confirms: QR fully visible, link info box below, footer (Chiudi + Scarica PNG green-lime) at the bottom of the natural flow — no overlap with QR image.
rca of the issue: Same pattern as iter 8 PushBroadcastDialog: DialogFooter default `sticky bottom-0` only behaves correctly inside a real scroll container. DialogContent uses flex + max-h-[calc(100dvh-2rem)] but has NO overflow-y-auto, so on short dialogs the sticky context is missing and the footer renders at the natural-flow bottom — which on iOS Safari with overflowing content can visually paint over the QR image's lower portion. The fix (override with `static mx-0 px-0 pt-2 border-t-0 bg-transparent`) drops the sticky requirement entirely for this short dialog and removes the negative margins / border-t, ensuring the footer sits strictly below the QR + info-box in the document flow. Verified deterministically on 3 viewports.
